title: Creating value from residual grass for feed applications through microalgal cultivation on grass juice
description: A study evaluating the use of residual grass juice as a substrate for cultivating microalgae to produce protein-rich feed ingredients. It covers juice pretreatment methods, algal growth optimization with Chlorella sorokiniana, microbial load control, and the nutritional quality of the resulting biomass, with insights on integrating further biorefinery processes.
